auth.label: AppID
auth.description: Wolfram|Alpha AppID sent with the appid query parameter. Create it from your My Apps page in the Wolfram|Alpha developer portal: https://developer.wolframalpha.com/portal/myapps

actions.name: get_short_answer
actions.description: Get a concise short answer from Wolfram|Alpha.

query.description: Natural-language query or mathematical expression sent to Wolfram|Alpha.

units.description: Measurement system requested by Wolfram|Alpha for unit-sensitive answers.

timeout.description: Maximum processing time in seconds accepted by Wolfram|Alpha.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a concise short answer from Wolfram|Alpha.

query.description: Original query sent to the short answer endpoint.

answer.description: Short textual answer returned by Wolfram|Alpha.

outputSchema.description: Normalized short answer payload returned by Wolfram|Alpha.

actions.name: get_spoken_result
actions.description: Get a spoken-style single-sentence result from Wolfram|Alpha.

query.description: Natural-language query or mathematical expression sent to Wolfram|Alpha.

units.description: Measurement system requested by Wolfram|Alpha for unit-sensitive answers.

timeout.description: Maximum processing time in seconds accepted by Wolfram|Alpha.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a spoken-style result from Wolfram|Alpha.

query.description: Original query sent to the spoken result endpoint.

outputSchema.description: Normalized spoken result payload returned by Wolfram|Alpha.

actions.name: validate_query
actions.description: Validate whether Wolfram|Alpha can interpret a query.

query.description: Natural-language query or mathematical expression sent to Wolfram|Alpha.

mode.description: Recognizer mode. Use default for general queries or voice for spoken phrasing.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for validating whether Wolfram|Alpha can interpret a query.

query.description: Original query sent to the recognizer endpoint.

mode.description: Recognizer mode. Use default for general queries or voice for spoken phrasing.

anyOf.description: Recognized Wolfram|Alpha domain for the query, when available.
Recognizer timing value returned by Wolfram|Alpha in milliseconds.
Recognizer significance score returned by Wolfram|Alpha, when available.
Suggested spelling correction returned by Wolfram|Alpha, when available.
Summary box path returned by Wolfram|Alpha, when available.

outputSchema.description: Normalized query validation result returned by Wolfram|Alpha.
